prestazioni: Engine swap to a 6VD1 3.2L V6 (or stroked 3.5L variant) with forged internals (JE Pistons 9.5:1 CR, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL Race Series bearings) and a custom billet crankshaft from Manley Performance. Pair with a Garrett GTX3582R turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing) on a custom tubular manifold by Burns Stainless, feeding into a GReddy Type-S intercooler (front-mount, 22x6x3.5 core) and a Tomei 80mm titanium blow-off valve.

Full standalone ECU conversion using a Haltech Elite 2500 with individual cylinder tuning, paired with a Bosch Motorsport 0280158002 1000cc/min fuel injectors and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump. Ignition system upgraded to AEM CDI with NGK Iridium IX spark plugs (heat range 7) and MSD 8.5mm super conductor wires.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (8-way adjustable damping, 200mm travel) and poly bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0116K for front control arms, #SPF0117K for rear trailing arms). Braking system upgraded to StopTech ST-60 two-piece rotors (332mm front, 328mm rear) with Brembo 4-piston calipers (front) and 2-piston calipers (rear), paired with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a custom Rocket Bunny-inspired kit (fiberglass fenders, 3-inch flares) with carbon fiber side skirts and a custom rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon. Front bumper replaced with a custom aluminum unit featuring integrated tow hooks and a 4-inch lower lip splitter with adjustable canards.

Full custom interior reupholstery in Alcantara (Automobili Lamborghini Verde Fausta color) with Recaro SRD-E seats (9-way adjustable, FIA-approved) and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly). Steering wheel replaced with a NRG Innovations 350mm suede wheel with quick-release hub, paired with a custom gauge cluster from Defi Advance BF (oil temp, oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR).

Exterior lighting upgraded to Morimoto XB LED headlights (projector-style, 5500K) with custom Hella 500FF fog lights (yellow lenses) and a full underglow kit from Oracle Lighting (RGB+W, 60-inch strips, wireless control). Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (18x10.5 +15 front, 18x11 +20 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (275/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear).
